name: pi-experiences
description: Human-reviewed habits for Pi coding agents—a local-first behavioral learning layer alongside skills and memory.

scripts.check: npm run check:agent-experience && npm run check:source && npm run check:cli && npm run check:generated
scripts.check:agent-experience: node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase1.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase2-storage.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase3-capture.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase4a-consolidation.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase4b-model-output.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase5-review.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase6-selector.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase7a-selector-adapter.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase7b8.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase9-setup-analyze.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase10-semantic-dedupe.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase11-storage-hardening.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase12-observations.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase13-local-embedding.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase14-semantic-atomicity.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase15-lock-recovery.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase16-conversation.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase17-scheduled-analyze.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/test-agent-experience-phase18-break-in.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
scripts.check:cli: npm run build && node ./dist/experience-consolidate.mjs --help >/dev/null && node ./dist/experience-consolidate.mjs status >/dev/null
